PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?attendance WHERE {
  ?series wdt:P31 ?seriesType ; wdt:P585 ?seriesTime ; wdt:P710 wd:Q504309 .
  VALUES ?seriesType {
    wd:Q160237 wd:Q191121
  }
  VALUES ?year {
    1982 2006 2011 2013
  }
  FILTER(YEAR(?seriesTime) = ?year)
  FILTER((?seriesType = wd:Q160237 && ?year = 2011) ||(?seriesType = wd:Q191121))
  ?series wdt:P361 ?game .
  ?game wdt:P1110 ?attendance .
  FILTER(BOUND(?attendance) && REGEX(STR(?attendance) , "^\\d+,\\d+$"))
  BIND(REPLACE(STR(?attendance) , "," , "") AS ?cleaned)
  BIND(xsd:integer(?cleaned) AS ?numAttendance)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?numAttendance)
LIMIT 1
